title: vol.068：The ¥16 Trillion Secret：Live Commerce and China's Private Traffic Strategy
description: The provided text, a newsletter excerpt from an IT journalist, introduces the concept of 私域流量 (private traffic), a key trend in Chinese marketing and e-commerce since around 2019. It explains that private traffic refers to customer traffic a company generates directly through its own channels, like blogs or social media, in contrast to 公域流量 (public traffic) which is acquired externally through advertising or influencers.
